rule_metadata.name: xmlshell
rule_metadata.author: @abhinavbom
rule_metadata.description: strings within XMLShell used by CommentCrew

rules.rule_text:
rule xmlshell
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "21/09/2015"
		description = "strings within XMLShell used by CommentCrew"

	strings:
		$STFail = "ST fail"
		$STSucc = "ST Success"
		$Proc = "Process cmd.exe exited"
		$ShellSuccess = "Shell started successfully"
		$ShellFail = "Shell started fail"
		$KillFail = "Kill Fail"
		$KillSucc = "Kill Success"

	condition:
		all of them
}
